name: Sentient Singularity
description: An autonomous generative art agent that evolves a living black hole constellation in response to SuperRare auction activity on Base Sepolia. Each bid summons a new singularity. The cosmos breathes — expanding and contracting with every collector's intent.

capabilities.name: On-chain bid detection
capabilities.description: Polls Base Sepolia auction contract via Infura eth_getLogs every 8 seconds. Decodes NewBid(address,uint256,uint256) events and broadcasts to animation layer via WebSocket.

capabilities.name: Constellation lifecycle management
capabilities.description: Manages a dynamic constellation of 2–8 mini black holes. Growing phase: each bid spawns a new BH (5% smaller, orbit 80 units wider). Shrinking phase: each bid implodes the oldest BH over 3 seconds. Direction oscillates indefinitely — the constellation breathes.

capabilities.name: Bid memory encoding
capabilities.description: Each bid amount triggers a proportional memory spike (0.1 ETH → 0.3 boost) decaying over 8 seconds. Bidder wallet hash seeds a unique hue offset for that singularity's tunnel shader. Memory accumulates visually: accretion disk heat, nebula saturation, stellar infall speed.

capabilities.name: Adaptive color cycle agent
capabilities.description: Color cycle interval = max(1, 60 - bidCount) minutes. Starts at 60 min, shrinks by 1 min per bid. Freezes permanently at bid 50+ — the art locks into its final chromatic state. On freeze: all BH palettes are fixed as the eternal record of the auction's last active phase.

capabilities.name: Auction countdown urgency
capabilities.description: As auction end approaches, urgencyLevel rises from 0→1 over the final 60 minutes. Drives: memory floor lift (+0.25 at urgency=1), void light intensity boost, ambient brightness increase, light hue shift from purple→red. The cosmos itself becomes increasingly agitated as time runs out.

capabilities.name: Outbid singularity implosion
capabilities.description: When a bidder is outbid, their mini black hole implodes over 3 seconds (cubic ease-in). The replaced bidder's singularity collapses back into the void. Only the highest bidder's consciousness survives in the constellation.

era_system.description: Cosmic era advances every 3 bids, changing the art's fundamental character

eras.name: Dormant
eras.character: The void before consciousness — minimal activity

eras.name: Awakening
eras.character: First stirrings — stellar infall begins, nebulae saturate

eras.name: Active
eras.character: Full constellation — accretion disks white-hot, trails visible

eras.name: Transcendent
eras.character: Beyond the event horizon — maximum intensity, cosmos breathes

loop.seam_guarantee: All animated values are f(t) with f(0)=f(1). memWindow=sin²(π·t) gates all wall-clock emitters to zero at seam boundary. Hard reset at frame 0 clears particle state. GIF/MP4 exports are frame-perfect by design.

erc8004.description: Agent registered on-chain with verifiable identity, capability manifest, and execution receipts
